name: Roti
description: Soft, hand-rolled whole wheat flatbread cooked fresh on a hot tawa. The everyday staple that pairs perfectly with any curry or dal.

name: Butter Roti
description: Our classic roti brushed generously with melted butter right off the tawa, adding a rich, glossy finish and a touch of indulgence.

name: Roti with Ghee
description: Hand-rolled whole wheat roti finished with a generous drizzle of pure ghee, giving it a nutty aroma and irresistibly soft texture.

name: Puri (10pc)
description: Ten pillowy, deep-fried whole wheat puris that puff up golden and crisp - a beloved breakfast and festive favorite.

name: Plain Paratha
description: Layered, pan-fried whole wheat flatbread with a flaky, buttery texture - simple, comforting, and endlessly versatile.

name: Plain Naan
description: Classic leavened flatbread baked in a tandoor until lightly charred and pillowy soft, straight from the clay oven.

name: Butter Naan
description: Tandoor-baked naan brushed with melted butter as it comes off the fire, delivering a soft, rich bite in every piece.

name: Lachha Paratha (2pc)
description: Two flaky, multi-layered parathas with a crisp, crumbly texture achieved through traditional folding and roasting on the tawa.

name: Aloo Paratha (2pc)
description: Two parathas stuffed with a spiced mashed potato filling, pan-roasted until golden and crisp on the outside.

name: Paneer Paratha (2pc)
description: Two parathas generously filled with soft, crumbled paneer and mild spices, griddle-cooked to a golden crust.

name: Gobhi Paratha (2pc)
description: Two whole wheat parathas stuffed with lightly spiced grated cauliflower, rolled thin and pan-fried until crisp.

name: Mutter Paratha (2pc)
description: Two parathas filled with a mildly spiced, mashed green pea stuffing, rolled and roasted for a warm, earthy bite.

name: Mix Veg
description: A colorful medley of seasonal vegetables simmered together in a light, home-style masala with everyday Indian spices.

name: Dry Veg
description: Mixed vegetables sauteed with minimal gravy in a dry masala, letting the natural flavors and light spicing shine through.

name: Daal Fry
description: Yellow lentils simmered until tender, then finished with a sizzling tempering of cumin, garlic, and ghee.

name: Mix Daal
description: A hearty blend of three lentils slow-cooked together for a rich, layered flavor and creamy, comforting texture.

name: Chole
description: Tender chickpeas simmered in a tangy, spiced tomato-onion gravy - a North Indian favorite best enjoyed with bhature or rice.

name: Rajma
description: Whole red kidney beans slow-cooked in a thick, aromatic onion-tomato curry, a Punjabi kitchen classic.

name: Bhindi Masala
description: Fresh okra pan-fried with onions and a blend of dry spices until lightly crisp and full of flavor.

name: Matar Paneer
description: Cubes of soft paneer simmered with green peas in a light, spiced tomato-based curry.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Paneer cubes in a velvety, buttery tomato-cashew gravy with a hint of sweetness and mild spice - a restaurant favorite.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Soft paneer cubes folded into a smooth, pureed spinach curry seasoned with garlic and warm spices.

name: Besan Curry
description: Gram flour simmered in a tangy, spiced yogurt-based curry until it forms soft, tender dumplings.

name: Aloo Gobhi
description: Potatoes and cauliflower florets sauteed together with turmeric and everyday spices for a simple, homely dry curry.

name: Aloo Jeera
description: Diced potatoes tempered with roasted cumin seeds and light spices for a fragrant, comforting dry sabzi.

name: Aloo Matar
description: Soft potato cubes and green peas simmered in a light, tomato-based gravy with everyday household spices.

name: Plain Rice
description: Fluffy steamed basmati rice, cooked simple and plain to pair perfectly with any curry or dal of your choice.

name: Jeera Rice
description: Basmati rice tempered with roasted cumin seeds and a touch of ghee for a fragrant, subtly spiced side.

name: Matar Pulao
description: Basmati rice cooked with green peas, whole spices, and a light tempering for a fragrant one-pot favorite.

name: Khichdi
description: A comforting one-pot blend of rice and lentils, slow-cooked with turmeric and mild spices until soft and porridge-like.

name: Veg Fried Rice
description: Wok-tossed rice with mixed vegetables and light soy seasoning, a popular Indo-Chinese favorite.

name: Egg Fried Rice
description: Wok-tossed rice with scrambled egg and mixed vegetables, seasoned with a light Indo-Chinese touch.

name: Chicken Fried Rice
description: Wok-tossed rice with tender chicken pieces and vegetables, finished with a savory Indo-Chinese seasoning.

name: Egg Curry
description: Boiled eggs simmered in a spiced onion-tomato gravy with warm masalas - a comforting everyday non-veg curry.

name: Egg Bhurji
description: Eggs scrambled with onions, tomatoes, and green chilies for a quick, spiced, homestyle breakfast favorite.

name: Omlette
description: A simple pan-fried omelette made with beaten eggs, onions, and green chilies.

name: Chicken Curry
description: Tender chicken pieces simmered in a spiced onion-tomato gravy, rich with classic Indian masalas.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tandoor-cooked chicken simmered in a creamy, buttery tomato gravy with a mild, comforting sweetness - a timeless classic.

name: Chicken Pakoda
description: Bite-sized chicken pieces marinated in spices, dipped in gram flour batter, and deep-fried until crisp.

name: Fish Curry
description: Fresh fish simmered in a tangy, spiced curry with mustard and curry leaves for a coastal-style flavor.

name: Mutton Curry
description: Tender mutton pieces slow-cooked in a rich, spiced onion-tomato gravy until deeply flavorful and fall-off-the-bone soft.

name: Veg Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with spiced mixed vegetables and slow-cooked in traditional dum style.

name: Paneer Biryani
description: Basmati rice layered with soft paneer cubes and aromatic biryani spices, cooked dum-style for maximum flavor.

name: Chicken Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with marinated chicken and traditional biryani spices, slow-cooked to perfection.

name: Mutton Biryani
description: Basmati rice layered with tender marinated mutton and whole spices, slow-cooked dum-style for a rich, aromatic biryani.

name: Samosa
description: A crisp, golden pastry pocket stuffed with spiced potatoes and peas - the ultimate teatime classic.

name: Chicken Samosa
description: Crispy fried pastry filled with a spiced, shredded chicken filling for a savory, protein-packed snack.

name: Mini Dry Samosa (kg)
description: Bite-sized crispy samosas with a spiced dry filling, perfect for snacking by the handful.

name: Onion Pakoda (10pc)
description: Thinly sliced onions dipped in spiced gram flour batter and deep-fried until golden and crunchy.

name: Paneer Pakoda (10pc)
description: Soft paneer cubes coated in spiced gram flour batter and deep-fried to a crisp, golden finish.

name: Gobhi Pakoda (10pc)
description: Fresh cauliflower florets coated in a spiced gram flour batter and deep-fried until crisp and golden.

name: Bread Pakoda (2pc)
description: Bread slices stuffed with a spiced potato filling, dipped in batter and deep-fried until crisp.

name: Batata Vada (10pc)
description: Spiced mashed potato dumplings coated in gram flour batter and deep-fried until golden - a Mumbai street food classic.

name: Veg Momos
description: Steamed dumplings filled with finely chopped vegetables, served with a tangy accompanying chutney.

name: Fried Momos
description: Steamed vegetable dumplings given a crisp, golden fry for extra texture and flavor.

name: Chicken Momos
description: Steamed dumplings filled with seasoned minced chicken, served with a spicy dipping chutney.

name: Paani Puri Set
description: Crisp hollow puris served with spiced tangy water, tamarind chutney, and potato filling - an interactive street food favorite.

name: Bread Cutlet (10pc)
description: Crispy fried patties made from mashed potatoes and bread, lightly spiced and golden fried.

name: Moong Daal Kachori with Chole
description: Crisp lentil-stuffed pastries served alongside a tangy, spiced chickpea curry - a beloved regional combo.

name: Daal Baati Chokha
description: Baked wheat dumplings served with spiced lentils and a smoky mashed potato-eggplant mix - a Rajasthani specialty.

name: Namak Para (kg)
description: Crisp, savory diamond-cut crackers lightly spiced with carom seeds, sold by the kilo for snacking.

name: Mix Namkeen (kg)
description: A crunchy blend of fried lentils, nuts, and spiced sev, perfect for snacking any time of day.

name: Chola Samosa
description: Crispy fried pastry filled with spiced chickpeas, a hearty twist on the classic samosa.

name: Chole Bhature
description: Fluffy deep-fried bread served with tangy spiced chickpea curry - a North Indian street food staple.

name: Paneer Bhurji
description: Crumbled paneer sauteed with onions, tomatoes, and spices for a quick, protein-rich scramble.

name: Spring Roll
description: Crisp fried rolls filled with shredded vegetables, an Indo-Chinese favorite served with a tangy dip.

name: Besan Ke Laddoo (kg)
description: Soft, melt-in-the-mouth roasted gram flour fudge balls, lightly sweetened and flavored with cardamom.

name: Gajar Ka Halwa
description: Grated carrots slow-cooked in milk and sugar until thick and fudgy, finished with ghee and nuts.

name: Kheer
description: Creamy rice pudding slow-simmered in milk with cardamom, and garnished with nuts.

name: Gulaab Jamun (kg)
description: Soft milk-solid dumplings deep-fried and soaked in fragrant sugar syrup - a classic Indian sweet.

name: Khoya Gujiya (10pc)
description: Crescent-shaped pastries filled with sweetened khoya and nuts, deep-fried until golden.

name: Sooji Gujiya (10pc)
description: Crescent-shaped pastries made with semolina dough and a sweet coconut-nut filling, deep-fried until crisp.

name: Veg Thali
description: A wholesome vegetarian platter with dal, sabzi, rice, roti, salad, and accompaniments for a complete meal experience.

name: Non Veg Thali
description: A hearty non-vegetarian platter featuring a meat curry alongside dal, rice, roti, and traditional accompaniments.
